creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sahil       2010-09-09 00:26:13 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    science              Makefile 
  Added files:
    science/p5-Physics-Unit Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Objects of class Physics::Unit define units of measurement that correspond
  to physical quantities.  This module allows you to manipulate these units,
  generate new derived units from other units, and convert from one unit
  to another.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Physics-Unit/
  
  PR:             ports/150245
  Submitted by:   Frederic Culot <frederic@culot.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.196     +1 -0      ports/science/Makefile
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/science/p5-Physics-Unit/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/science/p5-Physics-Unit/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/science/p5-Physics-Unit/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/science/p5-Physics-Unit/pkg-plist (new)
